maxref.name: stoplight
maxref.title: stoplight
maxref.digest: Queue and release data based on a control signal
maxref.description: The stoplight object manages a single data channel. When the left inlet (Inlet 0) receives data, it is either output immediately or queued if the right control inlet (Inlet 1) is non-zero. When the control inlet returns to zero, all queued data is released in First-In-First-Out (FIFO) order.

method.name: bang
method.description: In the left inlet: triggers output or queueing. In the right control inlet: 0 releases the queue, non-zero starts holding.

method.name: int
method.description: In the left inlet: triggers output or queueing. In the right control inlet: 0 releases the queue, non-zero starts holding.

method.name: float
method.description: In the left inlet: triggers output or queueing. In the right control inlet: 0 releases the queue, non-zero starts holding.

method.name: list
method.description: In the left inlet: triggers output or queueing. In the right control inlet: 0 releases the queue, non-zero starts holding.

method.name: anything
method.description: In the left inlet: triggers output or queueing. In the right control inlet: 0 releases the queue, non-zero starts holding.

attribute.name: log
attribute.description: When enabled, posts messages to the rightmost logging outlet regarding data reception, queueing, and flushing.
